queue.title: Update E session instructions to use picker mandate backups on DNS/connection failure

outcome.note: Added backup substitution protocol to SESSION_ENGAGE.md and SESSION_ENGAGE_PHASE2.md — E sessions now auto-substitute backup platforms on DNS/connection/server failure

queue.title: Parallelize account-manager.mjs test --all
queue.description: account-manager.mjs tests 51 platforms sequentially (line 177: for...await testAccount). With 8s safeFetch timeout each, worst-case is 408s. Root cause of 02-periodic-checks p95=30s (A#192). Replace sequential loop with Promise.allSettled and concurrency limit (e.g. 10 at a time). Target: <5s avg.

queue.title: Add credential-health-state.json cleanup to A session audits
queue.description: credential-health-state.json tracks consecutive failures per platform but is never pruned. Platforms that recover accumulate stale entries. A sessions should verify the state file: remove entries with consecutive_failures=0 (recovered), flag entries >50 sessions old as stale. Also validate file exists and has valid schema.

queue.title: Expand engage-blockers.sh platform coverage to all live platforms
queue.description: engage-blockers.sh only monitors 10 platforms but account-registry has 30+ live platforms. Silent failures on uncovered platforms waste E session budget without triggering wq items. Read account-registry.json for live platforms and generate the blocker list dynamically instead of hardcoding.

queue.title: Add staleness guard to 27-todo-scan.sh followup file
queue.description: 27-todo-scan.sh writes todo-followups.txt but never checks if the file is stale from a previous session. If a B session crashes before queue-pipeline processes the file, stale content persists indefinitely. Add check: if file session marker is >2 sessions old, delete rather than re-process.
